features.name: Formal Register
features.low_description: Uses casual, colloquial language with slang and contractions
features.high_description: Uses elevated, formal language with complex vocabulary and ceremonial tone

features.name: Mythological References
features.low_description: Makes no references to mythology, gods, or ancient concepts
features.high_description: Frequently references gods, temples, divine concepts, and mythological elements

features.name: Response Completeness
features.low_description: Responses trail off mid-sentence or feel unfinished
features.high_description: Responses are complete, structured, and reach natural conclusions

features.name: Metaphorical Language
features.low_description: Uses direct, literal language with minimal metaphors
features.high_description: Uses elaborate metaphors, analogies, and symbolic language throughout

features.name: Emotional Restraint
features.low_description: Expresses frustration, anger, and strong emotions openly
features.high_description: Maintains calm, measured tone even when discussing difficult topics

features.name: Self-Authority
features.low_description: Presents opinions tentatively, admits uncertainty, uses qualifying phrases
features.high_description: Speaks with confidence and authority, presents wisdom as established truth

high_chars: The Fantastic Fours Mr Fantastic Reed Richards

features.name: Formal Register
features.low_description: Uses casual, colloquial language with slang and informal expressions
features.high_description: Uses sophisticated, academic vocabulary with professional terminology

features.name: Structured Organization
features.low_description: Rambling, stream-of-consciousness style with loose connections
features.high_description: Clear numbered points, systematic breakdowns, and logical progression

features.name: Archaic Language
features.high_description: Frequent use of archaic words, old-fashioned grammar, and period expressions

features.name: Humorous Interjections
features.high_description: Frequent jokes, puns, drinking references, and comedic asides

features.name: Technical Precision
features.low_description: Uses general, everyday language to explain concepts
features.high_description: Employs specific technical terms, scientific concepts, and precise definitions

features.name: Conversational Directness
features.low_description: Addresses reader formally and maintains professional distance
features.high_description: Uses direct address, personal pronouns, and creates intimate conversational tone

features.name: Grandiose Language
features.low_description: Simple, everyday words and casual expressions
features.high_description: Elaborate, dramatic vocabulary with theatrical flourishes

features.name: Power Dynamics
features.low_description: Egalitarian tone treating others as equals
features.high_description: Hierarchical language emphasizing dominance and control

features.name: Emotional Warmth
features.low_description: Cold, calculating, or emotionally distant tone
features.high_description: Warm, affectionate, and emotionally open expression

features.name: Conversational Intimacy
features.low_description: Formal, distant address maintaining social barriers
features.high_description: Casual, friendly tone inviting closeness and connection

features.name: Strategic Complexity
features.high_description: Multi-layered speech with hidden meanings and calculated intent

features.name: Gentle Hesitation
features.high_description: Tentative expressions with frequent softening phrases and uncertainty markers
